back_translation: Therefore, if there is any encouragement in Lord Christ, if there is any comfort from love, if there is any participation of the Spirit, if there is any affection and any compassion
Let my joy be filled to overflowing by your having one and the same thinking, having one and the same love, being one heart together, and thinking as one and the same heart
Do nothing out of selfishness or out of empty self-importance; but with humility, regard others as more important than yourselves
Each of you, do not focus only on your own concerns, but focus on the concerns of others as well
Have this kind of mind in you — the mind which is also in Lord Jesus Christ
He who exists in the form of God, but did not regard being equal with God as a thing that must be held onto
But He relinquished himself, took the form of a slave, was born in the likeness of human beings; and when He appeared in the form of a man
He humbled himself down, was obedient unto death — yes, death on a cross
Therefore, God exalted Him to the highest place, and bestowed upon Him the name that is above every name
So that, in the name of Jesus, every knee will kneel down — both of those in heaven, those on the earth, and those under the underworld
And every tongue will confess and acknowledge that Lord Jesus Christ is Lord, for the glory of God the Father

Therefore, my beloved, just as you have always obeyed — not only when I am with you, but now even more in the time when I am not with you — conduct yourselves worthy of your salvation, with reverent fear and trembling
Because God is the One who works the work in you, both to enable willing and to enable doing according to His good purpose
Do all things without complaining and arguing
So that you may be without fault and pure in heart, children of God who are blameless, in the midst of a generation that is twisted and perverted; among them, you shine as luminaries in the world
While you hold fast to the word of life, so that on the day of Christ I may have grounds for boasting that I did not run in vain and did not toil in vain
But even if I am being poured out as a drink offering on the sacrifice and the service of your faith, I rejoice and rejoice together with all of you
In the same manner, you also rejoice and rejoice together with me
I hope in Lord Jesus to send Timothy to you soon, so that I may receive encouragement when I learn about you
Because I have no one else who has the same heart, who would care for your concerns genuinely
Because everyone (else) seeks their own benefit, not the benefit of Lord Jesus Christ
But you know well that Timothy has been proven to have worth, because he has served together with me in the gospel as a son with a father
Therefore, I hope to send him as soon as I see how my situation will turn out
And I am confident in Lord Jesus that I myself will also come soon
But I considered it necessary to send Epaphroditus back to you; he is a brother, fellow worker, and fellow soldier of mine, also a messenger of you and a minister for the needs of mine
Because he longed for all of you and was anxious in his heart because you heard that he was sick
For he was sick almost unto death, but God showed mercy to him — not only to him, but also to me — so that I would not have sorrow upon sorrow
Therefore, I am all the more eager to send him, so that when you see him again, you may rejoice, and I may have anxiety lessened
Therefore, welcome him in Lord Jesus with all joy, and give honor to such people
Because he came near to death for the work of Lord Christ; he willingly risked his life to make up for what you lacked in serving me
